name: pingcode-skill-multi-agent-install
title: PingCode skill multi-agent install
description: Extend bin/install.js so npx pingcode-skill installs the pingcode + pingcode-ctx skills to all four supported agent skill homes: ~/.codex/skills/, ~/.claude/skills/, ~/.openclaw/skills/, ~/.hermes/skills/project-management/. Update README/SKILL.md docs accordingly. Decoupled from active task pingcode-context-frontend-flow.
